structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors
Chesapeake Bay Watershed Nutrient Credit Exchange Program

law.text: Any person applying to establish a nutrient credit-generating entity or an operator of a nutrient credit-generating entity aggrieved by any action of the Department taken in accordance with this section, or by inaction of the Department, shall have the right to review in accordance with the provisions of the Administrative Process Act (§ 2.2-4000 et seq.).
